Name: -1_sentra_new_testament_redesign
Representative_Docs: ['Give it up for the Sentra now. So here are four things that I want to tell you about this beautiful new Sentra. First, with the exterior redesign.', 'Our three core sedans now share that bold new energetic flow design language and the vMotion front grille, boomerang headlights as well as taillights, and an aggressive stance. And second, the interior has new high-definition gauges that look great to the eye, a five-inch drive assist display, and much more once you get on the inside. And third, like the Model, Sentra adds a suite of available active safety driver assist technology which puts Sentra ahead of the competition.', 'Now, Sentra has been on a record pace, mind you, with sales up almost 10% so far this year and without a redesign. And in fact, Sentra has nearly doubled market share in just the last three years. And a testament to quality, more than 93% of the Sentra sold in the past 10 years are still on the road today.']

Name: 0_model_brand_car_new
Representative_Docs: ['Watch. Ladies and gentlemen, introducing the all-new 2021 Brand Model. Introducing the senior designer of Brand Design North America, Davis Lee.', "Hi, I'm Leonie von Haase, Miss Germany 2020. Today, I would like to introduce you to the new Brand Model, which is a completely new member to the brand's SUV range. Welcome to Berlin!", "So do I and so does Axel Lonsvinder, two-time Olympic champion. There's a video of him where he drives his Model up the mountain to go skiing. Dietmar watched that video and commented, hey Axel, how did you get the skis in the car?"]

Name: 1_warranty_000_000 mile_year
Representative_Docs: ['Best of all, every Brand Model includes ToyotaCare, which provides two years or 25,000 miles of scheduled maintenance, whichever comes first, and two-year unlimited mileage of 24-hour roadside assistance. And since every variant is a hybrid electric vehicle, it includes a hybrid system warranty covering select components for eight years or 100,000 miles, whichever comes first, and a 10-year or 150,000-mile hybrid battery warranty, whichever comes first, making it a strong choice for long-term ownership.', "And every Model includes ToyotaCare, which provides two years or 25,000 miles of scheduled maintenance, whichever comes first, and two-year unlimited mileage of 24-hour roadside assistance. The strength of Model 's value is further enhanced in its hybrid grades, which come with an 8-year or 100,000-mile hybrid system warranty, whichever comes first, and a 10-year or 150,000-mile hybrid battery warranty, whichever comes first, making them strong choices for long-term ownership.", 'And Model Plug-in Hybrid includes ToyotaCare, which provides 2 years or 25,000 miles of scheduled maintenance, whichever comes first, and 2-year unlimited mileage of 24-hour roadside assistance. This strong value is further enhanced by an 8-year or 100,000-mile hybrid system warranty, whichever comes first, and a 10-year or 150,000-mile hybrid battery warranty, whichever comes first, making this electrified SUV a strong choice for long-term ownership.']
